prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为31356→28568→32135→38490→38007，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024年大幅后移至38490后2025年小幅回升至38007，近两年累计后移约6800名；2025年基准位次约38007名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年248人、2022年246人、2023年264人、2024年287人、2025年331人，持续扩招；2026年计划365人，较2025年再扩招34人（增幅约10.3%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第113位持续上升至2026年第97位，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力和认可度增强；2022年曾因管理争议出现偏负面舆情，但近年声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第63位（评价一般），未见明显投档断档记录，报考心理整体中性；第五轮学科评估中化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；材料科学、机械工程等传统工科实力扎实，与招生专业中的化工、材料、机械等方向直接关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，太原理工在这些领域均有招生且位次靠前，可能吸引更多高分考生报考；河北省物理类考生数从2021年21.6万增至2025年36.3万，2026年总考生约61万，按历史比例估算物理类约36万，与2025年基本持平；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，与河北省相邻，地域接近性较强，对河北考生有一定吸引力；该校在河北省招生规模较大（2026年物理类365人），属于省外招生大户。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次38007、2026年扩招约10.3%（位次数字增大方向）、学校排名持续上升（竞争加剧方向）、热门工科专业热度高（竞争加剧方向）以及河北省物理类考生规模持平，扩招效应与竞争加剧因素相互对冲；以，考虑学校排名上升和热门专业吸引力的正向影响，小幅修正后预测最低位次约40149名，区间39649–40649名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 31356 → 28568 → 32135 → 38490 → 38007, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 38490, then slightly recovered to 38007 in 2025, with a cumulative decline of about 6800 positions over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 38007. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 248 in 2021, 246 in 2022, 264 in 2023, 287 in 2024, and 331 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 365, an increase of 34 (about 10.3%) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion that may alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, there was some negative public opinion due to management controversies, but recent reputation has been stable. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd (average evaluation), with no significant record of admission cutoffs, and overall neutral application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology received an A-, the only A- or above discipline. Traditional engineering fields like Materials Science and Mechanical Engineering are solid, directly related to majors such as chemical engineering, materials, and mechanics in the enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended. Taiyuan University of Technology offers these majors with higher rankings, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province increased from 216,000 in 2021 to 363,000 in 2025, with an estimated total of about 610,000 candidates in 2026, and Physics Category estimated at about 360,000, similar to 2025. The university is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, adjacent to Hebei, offering geographical proximity that attracts Hebei candidates. Its enrollment scale in Hebei is large (365 in Physics Category in 2026), making it a major out-of-province recruiter.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 38007, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.3% (which increases ranking numbers), the continuous rise in university ranking (intensifying competition), the high popularity of hot engineering majors (intensifying competition), and the stable number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province, the expansion effect and competition intensification factors offset each other. With the positive impact of the university's rising ranking and the appeal of popular majors, a slight correction predicts the minimum ranking to be about 40149, with a range of 39649–40649.

Candidates within this range should focus on Tier 2 majors (electronics/communication/automation/mechanical engineering, etc.) as primary choices, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Experimental Class/Computer Experimental Class, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Safety/Civil/Mining, etc.) as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly above the upper limit (<39649) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors; those near the lower limit (>40649) should prioritize Tier 3 safety options.

专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but fierce competition; Accounting is divided with a wait-and-see attitude; English/foreign languages are generally wait-and-see.
